zh.im Schwarzwald: 奧地利亞特斯皮塔爾 安 德 德勞史瓦茲瓦爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I於1227年之前出生在德國海因里希_海普洛文次時，他的父親Heinrich II. von Isenburg8歲，母親Mechthild von Hochstaden20歲。他於大約1251年與Imagina von Blieskastel在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 利包格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年在奧地利亞特斯皮塔爾 安 德 德勞史瓦茲瓦爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I于1227年之前出生在德国海因里希_海普洛文次时，他的父亲Heinrich II. von Isenburg8岁，母亲Mechthild von Hochstaden20岁。他于大约1251年与Imagina von Blieskastel在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 利包格结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年在奥地利亞特斯皮塔爾 安 德 德勞史瓦茲瓦爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Isenburg,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German or Jewish   Eisenberg  .
German: habitational name from the name of a medieval castle in the southern part of Hesse, the origin of a long line of nobility from the 12th century into the 21st century.

variants.name: Eisenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Moshe, Isadore, Akiva, Aron, Avner, Chaim, Emanuel, Isidor.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named, from Middle High German īsen ‘iron’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of 1.

nameMeanings.name: Herr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German herre, German Herr ‘master, lord’, applied as a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and behaved in a lordly manner, or as an occupational name for someone in the service of the lord of the manor. As a Jewish surname it is often artificial. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Hungary.
Southeast Asian (Hmong): variant of   Her   1.

variants.name: Her
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Yang, Chang, Chong.  Southeast Asian Pao, Vang, Chia, Chai, Chue, Kao, Pang, Tong, Kou, Shoua, Neng, Yeng, Tou, Seng, Xai, Yee, Cheng, Toua, Blong, Yer, Youa, Mai, Dang, Long, Thao, Bao, Kha, Pha, Mang, Cao, Da, Dao, Khia.
Southeast Asian (Hmong): from the name of the Her or Heu clan of the Hmong people in Laos, China, and Vietnam; in Chinese characters it is written 侯 (see   Hou   1). Compare   Herr   2 and   Heu   1.
Korean: variant of Hŏ (see Ho ).

variants.name: Herre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Otto.
German: variant of   Herr  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).
Norwegian: habitational name from either of two farmsteads, so named either from Old Norse herath ‘settlement, settled district’, or from Old Norse hár ‘high’ + ré ‘ridge’.

nameMeanings.name: Zu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 祖, meaning ‘ancestors’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal names Zu Jia (祖甲), Zu Yi (祖乙), Zu Xin (祖辛), Zu Ding (祖丁), and Zu Geng (祖庚), personal names of several kings during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the personal names of Zu Ji (祖己) and Zu Yin (祖尹), who were descendants of an official called Zhong Hui who lived some time during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ).

Mandarin form of the surname 俎, meaning ‘sacrificial utensil’ in ancient Chinese: (i) adopted as a surname by the Bao Zu (鮑俎) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (ii) said to be adopted by the fourth son of the uncle of the famous general Yue Fei (1103–1142  AD ), who changed the original surname Zhu (祝) to Zu (俎) in order to escape from political persecutions.

variants.name: Tsu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chen, Chi, Ching, Kin, Kung, Kuo, Yuk.  Vietnamese Mui, Loc.
Chinese:
alternative Mandarin forms of the Chinese surnames 祖 and 俎, see   Zu  .

nameMeanings.name: Gerlach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + lach ‘sport’. St Gerlach was a hermit who lived near Valkenburg in the 12th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I was born before 1227, in Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, his father, Heinrich II. von Isenburg, was 8 and his mother, Mechthild von Hochstaden, was 20. He married Imagina von Blieskastel about 1251, in Limburg, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1289, in Schwarzwald, Spittal an der Drau, Carinthia, Austria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I est né avant 1227, à Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich II. von Isenburg, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Hochstaden, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Imagina von Blieskastel environ 1251, à Kreis Limburg, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1289, à Schwarzwald, Spittal an der Drau, Kärnten, Autriche.

de.im Schwarzwald: Schwarzwald, Spittal an der Drau, Kärnten, Österreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I vor 1227 in Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich II. von Isenburg 8 und seine Mutter Mechthild von Hochstaden 20. Er hat um 1251 in Kreis Limburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland Imagina von Blieskastel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1289 in Schwarzwald, Spittal an der Drau, Kärnten, Österreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I è nato il prima del 1227 nel Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Heinrich II. von Isenburg, aveva 8 anni e il suo madre, Mechthild von Hochstaden, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Imagina von Blieskastel circa 1251, nel Kreis Limburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1289, nel Schwarzwald, Spittal an der Drau, Carinzia, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels Iが1227年以前にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズで生まれた時，父Heinrich II. von Isenburgは8歳，母Mechthild von Hochstadenは20歳であった。約1251年にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス リンブルグでImagina von Blieskastelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年にオーストリアクaルンテンスパッタル アン ダー ドラウスチワーズワルドで死去した。

ko.im Schwarzwald: 오스트리아 ka른텐 스피탤 앤 데르 드라 슈워즈월드
ko.lifeSummary: Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I(이)가 1227년 이전 독일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich II. von Isenburg(은)는 8세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechthild von Hochstaden(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1251년 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 림버그에서 Imagina von Blieskastel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 오스트리아 ka른텐 스피탤 앤 데르 드라 슈워즈월드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I nasceu antes 1227, em Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich II. von Isenburg, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Mechthild von Hochstaden, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Imagina von Blieskastel aproximadamente 1251, em Kreis Limburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1289, em Schwarzwald, Spittal an der Drau, Kärnten, Áustria.

ru.im Schwarzwald: щварзвалд, спитталь ан дир драу, кaрнтен, Австрия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I родился перед 1227 г. в местности раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich II. von Isenburg было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Hochstaden, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Imagina von Blieskastel около 1251 г. в местности крис лимбург, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности щварзвалд, спитталь ан дир драу, кaрнтен, Австрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I nació antes de 1227, en Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich II. von Isenburg, tenía 8 años y su mamá, Mechthild von Hochstaden, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Imagina von Blieskastel aproximadamente 1251, en Kreis Limburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1289, en Schwarzwald, Spittal an der Drau, Kärnten, Austria.
